---
title: "Stock_price_analysis"
author: "Trần Đức Hiển - 11222280"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(quantmod)
library(tidyquant)
library(tseries)
library(forecast)
```
```{r}
#Import data from yahoo finance
getSymbols("AAPL", src = "yahoo", from = "2020-01-01", to = Sys.Date())
df <- data.frame(date = index(AAPL), coredata(AAPL))
head(df)


```
```{r}
#Data processing  
df = df%>%
  rename(Open = AAPL.Open, High = AAPL.High, Low = AAPL.Low,
         Close = AAPL.Close, Volume = AAPL.Volume, Adjusted = AAPL.Adjusted)%>%
  mutate(year = year(date),
         month = month(date, label = TRUE))%>%
  mutate(Returns = log(Close / lag(Close)))%>%
  drop_na()
head(df)

#Mot vai thong ke mo ta
df %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(mean_price = mean(Close, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd_price = sd(Close,na.rm = TRUE),
            min_price = min(Close, na.rm = TRUE),
            max_price = max(Close, na.rm = TRUE))
#Gia cp cua apple co xu huong tang theo thoi gian, bien dong manh vao 2 nam 2020 va 2024 

df %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(avg_return = mean(Returns, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd_return = sd(Returns, na.rm = TRUE),
            pos_days = sum(Returns > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
            neg_days = sum(Returns < 0, na.rm = TRUE))

#Loi suat trung binh luon duong, so ngay co loi suat duong lon hon, tru 2022.


```
```{r}
#visualize
chartSeries(AAPL, theme = chartTheme("white"), type = "candlesticks")

#Heatmap loi suat theo thang
df_month = df %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(mean_return = mean(Returns, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(df_month, aes(x = month, y = factor(year), fill = mean_return)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "red", mid = "white", high = "darkgreen", midpoint = 0) +
  labs(title = "Heatmap: Monthly Average Returns",
       x = "Month", y = "Year", fill = "Avg Return") +
  theme_minimal()

# Moving Average
chartSeries(AAPL, TA = "addSMA(n = 20, col = 'blue'); addSMA(n = 50, col = 'red')")

# Bollinger Bands
chartSeries(AAPL, TA = "addBBands()")

# Relative Strength Index
chartSeries(AAPL, TA = "addRSI()")
```
```{r}
#Du bao gia su dung cac ki thuat time series 
library(zoo)
library(Metrics)
library(car)
library(lmtest)
library(urca)
close = ts(df$Close, start = c(2020,1), frequency = 252)

#ACF, PACF
acf(close)
pacf(close)

#ADF test
summary(ur.df(close,type = "trend",lag = 0))

#ARIMA
arima11 <- arima(close, c(1,1,1))
summary(arima11)
checkresiduals(arima11)

close_forecast = forecast(arima11, 5)
close_forecast
```
```{r}
#Du bao voi machine learning

library(TTR)  # RSI, SMA

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Return = log(Close / lag(Close)),
    Return_1 = lag(Return, 1),
    Close_lag1 = lag(Close, 1),
    Close_lag2 = lag(Close, 2),
    SMA20 = SMA(Close, n = 20),
    SMA50 = SMA(Close, n = 50),
    EMA12 = EMA(Close, n = 12),
    Vol_20 = rollapply(Return, 20, sd, fill = NA, align = "right"),
    RSI14 = RSI(Close, n = 14),
    weekday = wday(date, label = TRUE),
    month = month(date)
  ) %>%
  drop_na()

#Chia tap train/test 
n <- nrow(df)
train_idx <- 1:floor(0.8 * n)
test_idx <- (floor(0.8 * n) + 1):n

train <- df[train_idx, ]
test  <- df[test_idx, ]

# Chuẩn hóa cho ML (scale numeric features using preProcess)
library(caret)
num_vars <- c("Close","Close_lag1","Close_lag2","Return_1","SMA20","SMA50","EMA12","Vol_20","RSI14","Volume")
preproc <- preProcess(train[, num_vars], method = c("center", "scale"))
train_scaled <- train
train_scaled[, num_vars] <- predict(preproc, train[, num_vars])
test_scaled <- test
test_scaled[, num_vars] <- predict(preproc, test[, num_vars])

#random forest 
library(randomForest)

features <- c("Close","Close_lag1","Close_lag2","Return_1","SMA20","SMA50","EMA12","Vol_20","RSI14","Volume")
rf_mod <- randomForest(Close~., data =  train_scaled[, features], ntree = 500)
pred_rf <- predict(rf_mod, newdata = test_scaled[, features])

#XG boost
library(xgboost)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(train_scaled[, features]), label = train_scaled$Close)
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(test_scaled[, features]), label = test_scaled$Close)

params <- list(objective = "reg:squarederror", eta = 0.05, max_depth = 6, subsample = 0.8)
bst <- xgb.train(params, dtrain, nrounds = 500, watchlist = list(train = dtrain), verbose = 0)
pred_xgb <- predict(bst, newdata = dtest)


evaluate <- function(true, pred){
  list(
    RMSE = rmse(true, pred),
    MAE  = mae(true, pred),
    MAPE = mape(true, pred)
  )
}
res_rf    <- evaluate(test$Close, pred_rf)
res_xgb   <- evaluate(test$Close, pred_xgb)
res_rf
res_xgb
```
